'''âw-z-y''' ('''kawazay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jestergoon|jestergoon]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-z-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jestergoon|jestergoon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-z-y
|-
! Lemma
| kawazay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwazay|thiwazay]] || [[word:jiwazay|jiwazay]] || [[word:shiwazay|shiwazay]] || [[word:kiwazay|kiwazay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwazay|thuthuwazay]] || [[word:jujuwazay|jujuwazay]] || [[word:shushuwazay|shushuwazay]] || [[word:kukuwazay|kukuwazay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwazay|thuwazay]] || [[word:juwazay|juwazay]] || [[word:shuwazay|shuwazay]] || [[word:kuwazay|kuwazay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwazay|thuwazay]] || [[word:juwazay|juwazay]] || [[word:shuwazay|shuwazay]] || [[word:kuwazay|kuwazay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewazay|thewazay]] || [[word:jewazay|jewazay]] || [[word:shewazay|shewazay]] || [[word:kewazay|kewazay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowazay|thothowazay]] || [[word:jojowazay|jojowazay]] || [[word:shoshowazay|shoshowazay]] || [[word:kokowazay|kokowazay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowazay|thowazay]] || [[word:jowazay|jowazay]] || [[word:showazay|showazay]] || [[word:kowazay|kowazay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowazay|thowazay]] || [[word:jowazay|jowazay]] || [[word:showazay|showazay]] || [[word:kowazay|kowazay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwazay|thĂŠwazay]] || [[word:jĂŠwazay|jĂŠwazay]] || [[word:shĂŠwazay|shĂŠwazay]] || [[word:kĂŠwazay|kĂŠwazay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawazay|thathawazay]] || [[word:jajawazay|jajawazay]] || [[word:shashawazay|shashawazay]] || [[word:kakawazay|kakawazay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawazay|thawazay]] || [[word:jawazay|jawazay]] || [[word:shawazay|shawazay]] || [[word:kawazay|kawazay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawazay|thawazay]] || [[word:jawazay|jawazay]] || [[word:shawazay|shawazay]] || [[word:kawazay|kawazay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawazay|shawazay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawazay|goshawazay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawazay|gokishawazay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawazaynĂŒ|shawazaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawazaynknĂŒ|goshawazaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazaynĂŒ|gokishawazaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawazayshĂ«|shawazayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawazaynkshĂ«|goshawazaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawazayshĂ«|gokishawazayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazayro|shawazayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazaynkro|goshawazaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazayro|gokishawazayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazaymu|shawazaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazaynkmu|goshawazaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazaymu|gokishawazaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawazaysher|shawazaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawazaynksher|goshawazaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawazaysher|gokishawazaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawazayng|shawazayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawazaynkng|goshawazaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawazayng|gokishawazayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawazaya|shawazaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawazaynkya|goshawazaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawazaya|gokishawazaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawazayam|shawazayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawazaynkyam|goshawazaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawazayam|gokishawazayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawazaynĂŒshĂ«|shawazaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawazaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshawazaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawazaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishawazaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazaynĂŒro|shawazaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazaynknĂŒro|goshawazaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazaynĂŒro|gokishawazaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazaynĂŒmu|shawazaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazaynknĂŒmu|goshawazaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazaynĂŒmu|gokishawazaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawazayshĂ«nĂŒ|shawazayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawazaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawazaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawazayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazayshĂ«ro|shawazayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazaynkshĂ«ro|goshawazaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazayshĂ«ro|gokishawazayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazayshĂ«mu|shawazayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazaynkshĂ«mu|goshawazaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazayshĂ«mu|gokishawazayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawazayronĂŒ|shawazayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawazaynkronĂŒ|goshawazaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazayronĂŒ|gokishawazayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawazayroshĂ«|shawazayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawazaynkroshĂ«|goshawazaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawazayroshĂ«|gokishawazayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazayromu|shawazayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazaynkromu|goshawazaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazayromu|gokishawazayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawazaymunĂŒ|shawazaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawazaynkmunĂŒ|goshawazaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazaymunĂŒ|gokishawazaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawazaymushĂ«|shawazaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawazaynkmushĂ«|goshawazaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawazaymushĂ«|gokishawazaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazaymuro|shawazaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazaynkmuro|goshawazaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazaymuro|gokishawazaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
